node.statement: STEP: For a brickwall circuit of depth t, repeatedly applying the Weingarten formula Eq.(3) to each 2-site Haar gate yields a 2D classical Ising-like stat-mech model. Each spacetime site carries a permutation σ ∈ {e,s}. The Haar gates provide ferromagnetic interactions favoring aligned neighbors. The partition function is Z = Σ_config exp(-H_Ising).
